untranslatable_reason: Signal requires monitoring of competing strategy signals and dynamic profit compression thresholds (75% of 20-day baseline vs 5-day average). These require: (1) external signal feed integration not available in indicator set, (2) multi-timeframe rolling window comparisons (20-day baseline vs 5-day current) that cannot be expressed as single-bar conditions with allowed operators. The profit_compression_threshold_percentile (25th percentile) and competitive entry detection logic require statistical aggregation across multiple strategy signals unavailable in ALLOWED_INDICATORS.
translation_notes: This is a regime/meta-strategy rule about strategy erosion due to competition rather than a tradable technical signal. It requires monitoring competing traders' actions and comparing rolling profit windows—capabilities outside the scope of single-indicator backtesting conditions. Recommend implementing as a separate portfolio-level monitoring system rather than a per-instrument backtest rule.
